name: Jagankumar E
title: Technical Architect, eGov Foundation
tagline: Technical Architect building scalable healthcare and digital governance platforms that serve millions across India and Africa.
bio: I'm a Technical Architect at eGov Foundation with 7+ years of experience designing and building large-scale digital public infrastructure. I work across two major platforms: DIGIT (urban governance serving 450+ cities) and CARE (open-source health information system deployed nationwide).

Currently leading technical architecture for Care HMIS/TeleICU deployments, including integrations with PACS/DICOM servers, pharmacy systems (eAushadhi, DVDMS), and tele-radiology solutions. Previously architected DIGIT Studio — a low-code service delivery framework successfully deployed in Djibouti for building plan approvals.

I've delivered high-impact projects including HCM Console (health campaigns across Africa), DIGIT Workbench (configuration management using JSON Schema), and MUKTA (employment scheme platform in Odisha). My work spans full-stack development, system architecture, and team leadership, with expertise in React, Django, Kubernetes, and configurable frameworks.
Find my open-source contributions on GitHub, published packages on npm, and connect with me on LinkedIn.
